exception.message: element click intercepted: Element <input type="text" aria-label="auto Complete Search" autocomplete="off" aria-autocomplete="list" aria-controls="react-autowhatever-1" placeholder="Search" class="textInput-input-2jT" name="search_query" value=""> is not clickable at point (544, 26). Other element would receive the click: <iframe referrerpolicy="origin" id="attentive_creative" title="Sign Up via Text for Offers" src="https://shoebacca.attn.tv/creative?v=1.2.006&r=&w=1038&h=530&id=70111adcbfdd4a54990173fe38568bfc&l=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.shoebacca.com%2F&ss_ref=ORGANIC&t=n&pv=1" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; position: fixed; bottom: 0px; opacity: 1; transition: opacity 500ms ease 0s; border: 0px; overflow: hidden; left: 0px;"></iframe> (Session info: chrome=87.0.4280.88) Build info: version: '3.141.59', revision: 'e82be7d358', time: '2018-11-14T08:17:03' System info: host: 'SB-0888-LT', ip: '192.168.86.198', os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '15.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 87.0.4280.88, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 87.0.4280.20 (c99e81631faa0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\lyuba.b\AppData\Lo...}, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57876}, javascriptEnabled: true, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platform: WINDOWS, platformName: WINDOWS, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: ef18aa0c555266985a76f92aa5371fac
